title: Alumni Talk by Captain Shivam Garg
content: Apr, 11 2022 at 10:00 am Alumni Talk by Captain Shivam Garg JUIT Alumni Cell invites you to an Alumni Talk by Capt . Shivam Garg. He is an alumnus of the 2015 batch. He appeared in CDSE in 2014 and joined IMA in 2015. He passed out as a commissioned officer in Dec 2016. Presently He is serving as a peacekeeper working for the United Nations in a mission named MONUSCO in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Capt . Shivam has been commended by the Chief of Army Staff for a gallant operation in Jammu and Kashmir along the Line of Control. He'll be speaking on "Life Lessons from the Army." <
